creator: w@wrzask.pl
text:
On Thu, Oct 18, 2007 at 02:05:20PM +0000, Dmitry wrote:
> ACPI APIC Table: <A M I  OEMAPIC >

Try turning off ACPI. It did help for me in two separate cases.
Of course, it may equally as well cripple the system (SMP CPUs not being
detected, em(4) NIC's dying with watchdog timeouts...). Anyway, worth
trying.
